garantee: We guarantee confidentiality and data protection

topProcedures.title: Select Your Top 3 Procedures
topProcedures.description: Choose the Procedures you want to highlight most on your profile.

errors.selectSpecialty: Please select at least one specialty.
errors.selectCategory: Please select at least one category.

specialtySelector.title: What are your main specialties?
specialtySelector.subtitle: Select your specialties to personalize your profile and connect with patients.
specialtySelector.note: You can add or modify them later.

category.title: Select your domain of expertise and the procedures you offer
category.subtitle: Choose the categories and procedures that best represent your practice.
category.No categories: No categories available for the selected specialties.

procedure.pro selected: Procedures selected from your chosen categories.
procedure.No procedures: No procedures available for the selected category.

paymentPrices.title: Set your consultation prices
paymentPrices.description: Patients will pay the price you set. Esthetic Match takes a 15% platform fee, and the remaining amount goes to your connected Stripe account.

inClinic.title: In-clinic consultation
inClinic.description: The price patients pay for appointments at your clinic.

online.title: Online consultation
online.description: The price patients pay for online consultations.

stripe.title: Secure Stripe payments
stripe.description: Stripe handles payment collection, doctor payouts, and card processing. You will be redirected to Stripe to connect your account.

errors.invalidInClinicPrice: Please enter a valid in-clinic consultation price.
errors.invalidOnlinePrice: Please enter a valid online consultation price.
